mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Activity (type_id, start_time, end_time, user_id, department_id, description, activity_name, create_time) SELECT at.type_id, #{activity.startTime}, #{activity.endTime}, #{userIdString}, #{departmentIdString}, #{activity.description}, #{activity.activityName}, #{now} FROM activityType at WHERE at.type_name = #{activity.typeName};
mapper.select: select * from Activity order by create_time desc

select a.*, at.type_name as typeName from Activity a, activityType at where a.activity_name in (select activity_name from SigninUser where id = #{id}) and a.type_id = at.type_id order by a.create_time desc

select a.create_time, a.end_time, at.type_name, a.activity_name, a.description, s.id, s.user_name, d.name, s.signin_time, s.status from Activity a, activityType at, SigninUser s, Departments d where a.activity_name = #{activityName} and s.activity_name = #{activityName} and a.type_id = at.type_id and s.department_id = d.id;
select create_time as time,end_time,activity_name,description from Activity where activity_name = #{activityName}
